hero_subtitle: SFTY connects and routes Travel Rule messages across multiple providers to help VASPs maintain clear audit evidence and streamline exception handling within one operational workflow.

problem_title: Travel Rule routing depends on fragmented providers
problem_description: Compliance teams face delays and manual work when Travel Rule messages and status data remain disconnected across multiple providers. This creates gaps in routing completeness, slows exception handling, and weakens audit evidence within VASP workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates multiple Travel Rule providers to unify message routing, status tracking, exception handling, case workflows and audit evidence into a single compliance operating layer for VASP teams.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule messages to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY routes Travel Rule messages from multiple providers through status tracking, exception handling, case creation and evidence preservation within a unified compliance workflow.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another Travel Rule. The workflow layer

why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP Travel Rule routing?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance layer that connects Travel Rule messages, originator and beneficiary data, routing status, exceptions, and case workflows into one auditable system for VASPs.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage multi-provider routing?
faq_2_answer: SFTY orchestrates message routing by managing inputs and outputs from multiple Travel Rule providers, applying internal policies and routing logic across selected providers seamlessly.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule evidence?
faq_3_answer: Travel Rule cases, decisions, message statuses, and exception handling evidence are recorded and preserved in SFTY to support audit readiness and regulatory review.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing Travel Rule tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing Travel Rule solutions by connecting their outputs into structured workflows, preserving provider data without requiring replacement or duplication.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace our Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above Travel Rule providers, connecting their outputs into structured workflows rather than replacing the underlying message routing or validation services.
final_title: Connect Travel Rule routing into one compliance layer
final_description: Review how SFTY organizes message routing, exceptions, case linkage and audit evidence across multiple Travel Rule providers.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
